title: 20 screening in berlin subbed
wikitext:
[]: 2.0 screening in berlin (subbed)..             Quote Post by Ramiel² » Sun Nov 08, 2009 5:09 pm Just got the brand new news, next week(almost missed it) 2.0 is going to be screened 20 minutes away from my home at thee Zoo Palas. Screened on the 14 th novemeber. I hope i can pre-order some tickets. For those of you from germany,think about it. For the others, sorry for you guys :P http://uci-kinowelt-zoo-palast-berlin.kino-zeit.de/programm The prove. God i hope they don`t fuck it up like the 1st time. And the link from the original http://www.uci-kinowelt.de/Berlin_Zoo_Palast/Programm/Filme/222143/asia_ff%3A_evangelion_2.0_you_can_not_advance_omu

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Nov 08, 2009 7:00 pm Sage (you know who you are) needs to see this and tell me seeing it on the big screen helps changes his thoughts any. Anyway, awesome news about this showing in so many places. I really hope this means screenings in the States are on the horizon.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Sun Nov 08, 2009 7:23 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Sage (you know who you are) needs to see this and tell me seeing it on the big screen helps changes his thoughts any. Anyway, awesome news about this showing in so many places. I really hope this means screenings in the States are on the horizon.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Mon Nov 09, 2009 12:45 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: Anyway, awesome news about this showing in so many places. I really hope this means screenings in the States are on the horizon.

[]: Re: 2.0 screening in berlin (subbed)..             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Nov 09, 2009 1:09 am Ramiel² wrote: For the others, sorry for you guys :P

[]:             Quote Post by JimmyWolk » Mon Nov 09, 2009 11:25 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: Sage (you know who you are) needs to see this and tell me seeing it on the big screen helps changes his thoughts any.

[]: Re: 2.0 screening in berlin (subbed)..             Quote Post by Ramiel² » Mon Nov 09, 2009 12:38 pm NAveryW wrote: Ramiel² wrote: For the others, sorry for you guys :P

[]:             Quote Post by Marzan » Thu Nov 12, 2009 3:55 pm Berlin, Paris, Barcelona... i really hope 2.0 comes to some festival here in Denmark or at least Sweden sometime soon. Otherwise I'll have to wait a long time for the dvd...

[]: Re: 2.0 screening in berlin (subbed)..             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Nov 15, 2009 7:36 am Ramiel² wrote: NAveryW wrote: Ramiel² wrote: For the others, sorry for you guys :P

[]:             Quote Post by TMSIDR » Mon Nov 16, 2009 7:34 pm I watched in Berlin and I really enjoyed the movie. I had high expectations and khara delivered exactly what I wanted (and of course surprised me a couple of times^^).
